data.body: USER DIRECTIVE: implement S5d + ea61 hardening FULLY (not force-close). Verifier-found gaps to fix: S5d(38be) — (1) compose stop_grace_period:120s; (2) recovery.json includes acknowledged flag; (3) bounded 120s drain on SIGTERM (finish in-flight wip, heartbeat each tick vs autoheal); (4) reconcile_recovery per-phase rules for all 6 phases; (5) integrated heartbeat-freshness proving test; (6) crash-at-each-phase test matrix. ea61(S5b) — (7) fetch-secrets get_param (fail-fast) not get_param_optional; (8) smoke-check rewrite to AC5 read-only provisioning checks. Held-out TDD for the testable units; land + redeploy + close signed.
